query:
SELECT ur.role_name AS "role_name!",
                  rs.scope_type AS "scope_type?",
                  rs.pattern AS "pattern?"
           FROM user_roles ur
           LEFT JOIN role_scopes rs ON ur.role_name = rs.role_name
           WHERE ur.user_email = ?
           ORDER BY ur.role_name, rs.scope_type, rs.pattern
